description: Drop-in wrapper for the data-watch-page button. Renders an icon, compact, or full-button variant that toggles whether the current page is in the user's VBStore('watches') list. State machine lives in src/utils/page-watch-init.js — this is a one-tag author convenience.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Override the visible text in compact and button variants. Defaults to 'Watch for updates' / 'Watching'.

attributes.name: server-sync
attributes.description: Per-instance opt-in for server-side sync via VBService('notify'). Sets window.vbPageWatch.serverSync = true before page-watch-init evaluates.

attributes.name: data-variant
attributes.description: Reflected by the component to pick the visual variant in CSS

events.name: page-watch:add
events.description: Bubbles from the inner button when the user starts watching

events.name: page-watch:remove
events.description: Bubbles from the inner button when the user stops watching
